chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Narrations Regarding Tawaf.

text: 2842 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سَعِيدٌ اَلْأَعْرَجُ : عَنِ اَلْمُسْرِعِ وَ اَلْمُبْطِئِ فِي اَلطَّوَافِ فَقَالَ «كُلٌّ وَاسِعٌ مَا لَمْ يُؤْذِ أَحَداً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2842 - Sa'id al-A'raj asked Imam (as) about those who are fast and those who are slow in circumambulation.
Imam (as) replied: "Both are permissible as long as no one is harmed."
